since_last: 37% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.98%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 37% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.58% · BTC -2.33% · Gold -2.31% · Nasdaq100 -0.33%. 37% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.98%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.98%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.33%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +10.99%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +10.99%, AVGO +5.93%, ANET +5.86%, BIDU +4.42%, AMBA +3.66%. Laggards: UPST -5.72%, PANW -4.49%, RXRX -4.30%, CRNC -4.17%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.13% at $149.66
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.13% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
